title: RNA-Seq-data
author: Syme, Anna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: RNA-seq data for analysing differential gene expression. Data from bacteria (E. coli) and subsampled to 1% or original data size. Six FASTQ files and two reference files (genome sequence and annotations).
steps_raw: RNA-seq data for analysing differential gene expression. Data from bacteria (E. coli) and subsampled to 1% or original data size. Six FASTQ files and two reference files (genome sequence and annotations).
